text: A street scene in a city. On the left, a building has a dark, closed metal roller shutter door. Above the shutter, a white tarp covers a construction site with exposed rebar. A scooter is partially visible in the foreground. On the right, a building with a yellow wall and a blue corrugated metal awning is visible. Several bunches of ripe bananas are hanging from the awning structure. The background shows a clear blue sky and utility wires.
label: Image
